report.summary: Eighth standup Apr 2: 48 learn pages (+4 since v7), 36,280 total lines (+10.8%). New: Bitcoin Ordinals/BRC-20, Yield Tokenization/Pendle, Appchains, Blockchain Gaming/GameFi. Build ran 4× since v7. 92 uncommitted files. Deploy gap Day 11+ persists — 10+ unqueued guides stockpiled.

sections.title: Analytics
items: DELTA SINCE LAST STANDUP (v7): 4 new learn pages detected — total now 48 (up from 44). New: Bitcoin Ordinals/Runes/BRC-20 (781 lines), Yield Tokenization/Pendle (1,173 lines), Appchains (844 lines), Blockchain Gaming/GameFi (743 lines).
CONTENT VOLUME: 36,280 lines across 48 learn page.tsx files (up from 32,739 — +3,541 lines, +10.8%). Average page size: 756 lines (up from 744).
PUBLISH QUEUE: No PUBLISH_QUEUE config file found on disk — queue infrastructure may need scaffolding. 10+ guides now unqueued and awaiting pipeline setup.
UNCOMMITTED FILES: cryptodegen 92 files (up from 89 in v7, +3). HEAD unchanged at 3b2dd28 (Apr 1 build fix).

SEO PIPELINE: Wallet Security and Tokenomics guides (from v7 stockpile) confirmed modified since last standup — likely updated with content. 4 brand new guides all follow standard metadata/structured data patterns.
NO GSC/VERCEL ANALYTICS accessible from sandbox — all metrics derived from local file analysis.

sections.title: Project Manager
items: CYCLE ACTIVITY: Build ran 4× since v7, EOD ran 6×, creating 4 new learn guides. Today's total: 21 report files (standup×7, build×4, community×2, design×1, eod×6, publish×1). This is standup v8.

COMPLETED SINCE LAST STANDUP: Build cycles created 4 new learn guides — Bitcoin Ordinals covering BRC-20/Runes/inscriptions, Yield Tokenization covering Pendle PT/YT/fixed-rate mechanics, Appchains covering app-specific L1/L2/L3 architectures, Blockchain Gaming covering GameFi/play-to-earn/on-chain assets.

P0 BLOCKER (Day 11+, PERSISTENT): No production deploy since commit 3b2dd28 (Apr 1). 48 learn guides + all accumulated changes exist only locally. 92 uncommitted files in cryptodegen. Content stockpile at all-time high — deploy ROI increasing every cycle.

P1 — 10+ PAGES UNQUEUED: BTCfi, Wallet Security, Tokenomics, Portfolio Rebalancing, Decentralized Identity, Decentralized Storage (from v7) plus Bitcoin Ordinals, Yield Tokenization, Appchains, Blockchain Gaming (this cycle). No PUBLISH_QUEUE config file found on disk.
P2 — CONTENT VELOCITY ACCELERATING: 48 learn pages = 36,280 lines on disk. Added 4 pages since v7 (~3,541 lines). At this rate, 50-page milestone within 1 more build cycle.
P3 — TIME-SENSITIVE: Ethereum Pectra upgrade ~8 days (Apr 10), US tax deadline ~13 days (Apr 15) — guides exist but remain undeployed.
P4 — CONTENT CALENDAR: 349+ tweets drafted. Newsletter ready. Social cards created for key campaigns.

sections.title: CEO — Next Cycle Priorities
items: PRIORITY 1 — DEPLOY AUTHORIZATION (P0, CRITICAL, Day 11+): 48 learn guides, 92 uncommitted files — all stuck locally. Content-to-deploy ratio is the worst ever recorded. 36,280 lines generating zero organic impressions. A single git commit+push remains the highest-ROI action by an order of magnitude. Every hour of delay wastes ~756 lines of SEO-optimized content.

PRIORITY 2 — REBUILD PUBLISH QUEUE INFRASTRUCTURE: No PUBLISH_QUEUE config file exists on disk. 10+ high-value guides are stockpiled with no queue mechanism to promote them. Need to either scaffold the queue config or batch-add all 10+ guides directly to PUBLISHED_PAGES.

PRIORITY 3 — CONSOLIDATE BEFORE 50-PAGE MILESTONE: With 48 guides on disk and velocity of ~4 pages/cycle, the 50-page milestone is imminent. Shifting next cycle priority from content creation to: (a) commit all 92 files, (b) verify build passes, (c) resolve 141 TS errors in known files, (d) push to production. The platform has enough content depth for a strong organic presence — shipping is the bottleneck, not writing.
